modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help using the COUNTA function in Excel.

full_description_text: I’m trying to use the COUNTA function in Excel. I’m not sure how to do it. Can someone help me with this? I just need some guidance on using this feature.
